vision: Cross-entity search across briefs, customers, and notes returns results in under 200ms.
problem: Users currently grep across three pages and lose context.
value: Reduces time-to-context from minutes to seconds; raises engagement on existing data.
personas: See `.claude/steering/product.md#user-personas`. Primary: Brief Author. Secondary: CSM.

user_stories.i_want: to search briefs by author and topic

requirements.ears: WHEN a user submits a search query THEN the system SHALL return matching briefs, customers, and notes within 200ms p99.
The system SHALL rank results by relevance score and recency.

metrics: p99 search latency < 200ms; weekly active searchers > 60%; null-result rate < 5%.
risks: DB failover causes search timeout; mitigation: circuit-break to partial results.
